title: provider usage return stabilization
goal: OpenAI と Claude provider が usage 情報を返し、run_session.py の extract_api_usage で実データを扱える状態にする
constraints: must not add new api calls
must preserve current provider call flow
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/providers/openai_client.py: expose usage metadata in returned structure if available from provider response
orchestration/providers/claude_client.py: expose usage metadata in returned structure if available from provider response
backend/tests/*: provider usage extraction coverage only
